AboutPage.title: About Sora2 Video
AboutPage.description: Sora2 Video is the cinematic automation platform for launch teams, combining sora prompts, collaboration, and governed delivery in one stack.
AboutPage.introduction: 👋 Welcome to Sora2 Video. We help studios, marketers, and comms teams craft cinematic launches by unifying sora prompts, realtime reviews, and distribution macros inside one secure platform.

HomePage.title: sora2 Video Engine — Cinematic Automation for Launch Teams
HomePage.description: sora2video.online pairs the sora2 cinematic engine with guided sora prompts so campaigns publish production-grade motion without reshoots.

hero.title: Design, preview, and deliver with sora2
hero.description: Feed a single sora prompt or an entire storyboard into the sora 2 engine. sora2 renders lighting, audio, and edit beats in minutes so marketing, creative, and leadership stay aligned.

items.label: Edit hours saved inside the sora 2 pipeline

features.title: What sora2 delivers
features.description: Every feature is tuned to keep sora prompts, stakeholders, and final masters moving in sync.

items.title: Guided sora prompts
items.description: Built-in frameworks turn campaign briefs into structured sora prompts, balancing voice, pacing, and compliance.

items.title: Cinematic render brain
items.description: The sora2 engine optimises lighting, physics, and character beats automatically while you iterate.

items.title: Real-time collaboration
items.description: Review and annotate directly on sora 2 timelines without exporting files or breaking version control.

items.title: Omni-channel delivery
items.description: Export 16:9, 9:16, 1:1, and interactive formats with consistent metadata and localisation powered by sora2.

workflow.title: Ship campaigns the sora2 way
workflow.description: A three-step cadence keeps every release predictable while teams stay agile.

steps.title: Map the universe
steps.description: Upload lookbooks, scripts, and data. sora2 frames environments and motion beats automatically.

steps.title: Author sora prompts
steps.description: Build each sora prompt beside references and capture intent, emotion, and channel requirements.

steps.title: Publish with confidence
steps.description: Lock sign-off in the sora 2 dashboard, then push ready-to-air masters to every territory.

templates.title: Sora prompt libraries included
templates.description: Plug-and-play prompt packs accelerate everything from fandom teasers to executive briefings.

items.title: Product launch arcs
items.description: Multi-scene sora prompts for hero reveals, feature chapters, and post-launch recaps.

items.title: Fandom engagement
items.description: Interactive sora prompt beats tuned for premieres, lore drops, and community showcases.

items.title: Enterprise comms
items.description: Board-ready sora prompts that pair motion graphics with compliance-safe narration.

testimonials.title: Trusted by sora2 pioneers
testimonials.description: Studios, agencies, and in-house teams rely on sora2video to keep story, data, and delivery in one rhythm.

items.name: Lena · Launch Director
items.quote: “sora2 cut our previsualisation window from weeks to hours. Every sora prompt stayed intact through localisation.”

items.name: Marcus · Studio EP
items.quote: “We briefed sora2 with investor talking points and received Dolby-ready edits that needed zero reshoots.”

items.name: Aya · Community Producer
items.quote: “The fandom-ready sora prompts let us drop surprise chapters overnight without sacrificing polish.”

cta.title: Ready to orchestrate a sora2 launch?
cta.description: Start with guided sora prompts, automated compliance, and publishing macros tailored to your release cadence.

faq.title: sora2 launch FAQs
faq.subtitle: Answers for teams exploring sora prompts, governance, and delivery.

items.question: Do we need prompt engineering expertise?
items.answer: No. sora2 supplies structured sora prompt templates with guardrails. You can still customise keywords for advanced control.

items.question: How does sora2 handle privacy?
items.answer: Assets stay encrypted, version-controlled, and can be auto-purged. sora2 never trains third-party models on your content.

items.question: Can we collaborate in real time?
items.answer: Yes. Comment, approve, and adjust deliveries together inside the sora 2 workspace without exporting files.

items.question: Which devices are supported?
items.answer: sora2video runs smoothly on modern browsers, with touch-optimised controls for tablets and phones.

pricing.title: sora2 Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that matches your launch velocity
pricing.description: Start with exploratory sora prompts for free. Upgrade for collaborative seats, private render capacity, and compliance auditing.

caseStudies.title: How teams thrive with Sora2
caseStudies.description: From premieres to enterprise briefings, see how the tool station powers measurable outcomes.

items.title: Nebula Systems — Orbital reveal
items.summary: Co-located creative and compliance in Sora2, shipping a multilingual investor broadcast overnight.
items.impact: +91% watch completion, 8 subtitle packs generated automatically

items.title: Prism Collective — Fandom drops
items.summary: Used Sora2 prompt kits to push surprise lore chapters with zero late-night rendering marathons.

items.title: Shift Mobility — Autonomous preview
items.summary: Synchronized Sora2 timelines with product telemetry, giving stakeholders real-time insight dashboards.

items.question: Do we need prompt engineering experts to start?
items.answer: Sora2 ships with guided sora prompts, guardrails, and best-practice templates. Power users can still dive into advanced parameters whenever needed.

items.question: How does Sora2 handle team permissions?
items.answer: Assign roles per workspace, lock sensitive scenes, and archive approval logs. Each action is tracked for governance across the Sora2 stack.

items.question: What payment options are available?
items.answer: Subscribe monthly or yearly, unlock lifetime access, or add usage with credit packs – all processed securely through Stripe within the Sora2 console.

items.question: Can we integrate analytics with existing BI tools?
items.answer: Yes. Export telemetry from the Insight Engine via API or push directly into your BI warehouse to blend with campaign KPIs.

items.question: Is localisation managed automatically?
items.answer: Sora2 localisation macros generate caption files, metadata, and visual variants per market so launches stay consistent globally.

hero.title: Build your launch universe with Sora2
hero.description: Sora2 Video orchestrates cinematic automation, combining sora prompts, realtime review, and distribution macros so every campaign ships consistently.

sections.title: Connected launch control
body: Author sora prompts, manage assets, and preview scenes in one console with live guardrails.
Role-based workspaces keep creative, marketing, and legal aligned without juggling files.

sections.title: Governance-ready workflows
body: Approval stages capture annotations, version history, and compliance sign-off for every shot.
Localization macros produce caption packs, metadata, and territory variants automatically.

sections.title: Intelligence at every stage
body: Insight dashboards surface engagement forecasts, retention scores, and optimisation cues as you iterate.
Benchmark new launches against previous Sora2 campaigns to prioritize boosts and media spend.

hero.title: Compose cinematic prompts with confidence
hero.description: Preview lighting, motion, and audio beats while Sora2 tracks governance, metadata, and delivery outputs.

sections.title: Workspace highlights
body: Compare prompt variants side by side with synchronized camera paths and lighting changes.
Lock brand palettes, typography, and caption tokens so every rendition stays on brief.

sections.title: Advanced controls
body: Structure prompts with context, physics cues, and delivery tokens using guided schema panels.
Batch generation produces governed renditions for chapters, ad sets, or region-specific edits.

sections.title: Delivery outputs
body: Export cinematic masters in 16:9, 9:16, and 1:1 along with localization macros and metadata.
Push approved scenes directly into the Tool Station, asset library, or downstream channels.

PolicyUgcPage.title: UGC & Copyright Policy
PolicyUgcPage.description: Creators may upload only media they have rights to use. We review takedown requests within 24 hours and provide safe remix tools.
body: Sora2 Video lets you orchestrate cinematic stories with your own assets and sora prompts. Only upload media, prompts, and overlays you have permission to use.
We do not host unlicensed celebrity likenesses or commercial IP. For takedown requests, email support@sora2video.online with relevant URLs and proof of ownership. We respond within 24 hours.
